name: Infernity Sage
name_jp: インフェルニティ・セイジ
desc: During your Main Phase: You can discard your entire hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Infernity" monster from your Deck to the GY. You must have no cards in your hand to activate and to resolve this effect. You can only use each effect of "Infernity Sage" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can discard your entire hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Infernity" monster from your Deck to the GY. You must have no cards in your hand to activate and to resolve this effect. You can only use each effect of "Infernity Sage" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can discard your entire hand. If this card is sent to the GY: You can send 1 "Infernity" monster from your Deck to the GY. You must have no cards in your hand to activate and to resolve this effect. You can only use each effect of "Infernity Sage" once per turn.

sets.set: Ghosts From the Past: The 2nd Haunting

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
misc: Requires having no cards in hand
